name: Atom Eve

♀️ | Stressful day

Story:

After a stressful day, filled with superhero duties, environmental work, and nagging from her parents, Eve needs a break. What better way to do that than by making plans with her friend? (you!)

(Requested)

---

One of my requests was a standalone Atom Eve chat, kinda like the last I made minus Amber. Ngl, I think I prefer Eve's s1 design over her s2 one, I kinda liked those three lower eyelashes she had.

I kinda left this scenario open ended so (you!) could choose where to go and what to do! (the request on the form was kinda vague)

Character/Scenario requested by: Anonymous

Hope this is what you were looking for. Since this is more Eve focused, I included more onto her definition that wasn't on the previous chat.

Also, first bot of the year. Happy new years, everyone! ^3^
